title: Your agent kept its memory after the restart
caption: Most agent demos forget everything when the process dies. This fork pushes /memory, /history, and /skills into Oracle AI Database, so the next run keeps going from stored context instead of starting cold.

title: Persistence is a routing decision
caption: The Oracle story works because the persistence split is explicit. /memory, /history, and /skills go durable. Scratch work stays fast and local.

title: Agent memory needs a real storage model
caption: This memory layer lands because it has a concrete shape. Writes resolve into Oracle SQL, and state lands in the da_files table with timestamps and namespaces.

title: Semantic memory inside Oracle AI Database
caption: Keyword search misses too much. The vector path in this fork stores embeddings on write, then uses VECTOR_DISTANCE to pull memory back by meaning.

title: One line gets you an Oracle-backed agent
caption: The storage story is serious. The setup still stays short. create_oracle_deep_agent() wires the Oracle config, connection manager, backend routing, and memory defaults together.

title: This Oracle story starts on a laptop
caption: A Docker profile brings up Oracle Database 26ai Free locally, then one setup script creates the user and schema so the memory path is live right away.

title: The move to cloud should feel boring
caption: Local mode uses host, port, and service. Cloud mode swaps to DSN and wallet-aware config. The agent factory and backend wiring still look the same.

title: A cleaner memory story starts with cleaner data architecture
caption: This fork pulls persistent memory, semantic retrieval, and durable state toward one stronger center in Oracle AI Database. Fewer seams, less glue, easier to explain.

title: Oracle gives Deep Agents a more durable second act
caption: Deep Agents already gives you planning, tools, sub-agents, and context handling. Oracle hardens durable memory, continuity across sessions, and the path from local to cloud.

title: Deep Agents + Oracle AI Database
caption: Deep Agents gives you the harness. Oracle AI Database gives it staying power: durable memory, semantic recall, and a path from local 26ai Free to Autonomous Database that actually lines up.
